finding: The canonical queue is a historical baseline and can be older than additive owner-scoped queue updates; current state must be derived by validated temporal reconciliation without overwriting prior observations.

claim_states.observed: ACTIVE_QUEUE at the cited blob records M-001 completed with a next handoff, while a later queue-update commit records an additional completed follow-on slice.
claim_states.inferred: Neither source is sufficient alone for current-state reconstruction.
claim_states.proposed: Use the committed precedence contract for all future queue reconciliation.
claim_states.superseded: Latest canonical file equals complete current state.
claim_states.unresolved: The policy is committed but has no executable repository-wide validator or authenticated test run.

verification.result: The cited baseline blob and both later commits were observable before artifact creation.

falsification_route: Compare timestamps, commit ancestry, queue-item ownership, and referenced files; reject the finding if the delta predates the baseline or belongs to another owner/item.
